_description: Aluminium foil current collector — standard choice for positive electrodes in lithium-ion cells.
name: Aluminium foil
comment: 16 µm electrolytic-grade aluminium foil with double-sided roughness for improved coating adhesion. Standard for LFP, NMC, and NCA positive electrodes. Copper foil is used instead for negative electrodes due to the more negative anode potential.
